_note: TEMPLATE example — chop halves the risk budget (0.5x), so fewer names are funded and most of the book stays in the USDT reserve.

computed.regime_reason: breakout/risk_on not met (breadth 50 < 55), risk_off not met (breadth 50 > 40, fg 48 > 30, median 0.1 > -2) -> default chop

entry: Enter score >= 0.65, max 5; chop halves the risk budget (0.5x) so far fewer names are funded.
Per-name cap 17%; route by score share of the reduced risk budget.
exit: Trim/exit when score < 0.50 on a held name; force-exit at stop_loss 12% or take_profit 25%.
On a downgrade to risk_off, rotate to USDT regardless of the signal.

actions.reason: score 0.87 >= 0.65; per-name cap 17 within halved budget
qualifies on score but no risk budget left this cycle (chop 0.5x)
